e1_sentence: Narrated 'Aisha
e2_sentence: Sahd said, "I give my judgment that their warriors should be killed,  their women and children should be taken as captives, and their properties  distributed.

e1_sentence: Sahd was wounded on the day of Khandaq (i.e. Trench) when a man from Quraish,  called Hibban bin Al-'Araqa hit him (with an arrow)
